grok_build_pass3.description: Pass 3: Semantic document extraction + custom modular layout (AOs left, Telemetry right, Core/Superloop center). Excludes: tests, scripts, vendored bloat, graphify-out self-ref, Starcom (for now).
grok_build_pass3.notes: This snapshot preserves the Grok Build semantic/layout work. Future updates should use graphify update . and re-apply layout script if needed. Do not run full graphify . without preserving this state.
